task_completion.description: Navigate to the Risks management section in the Eramba interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface is visible with the Risks module or list of risks displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the specific risk titled 'Unencrypted Data at Rest' for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form, modal, or details page specifically for the risk titled 'Unencrypted Data at Rest' is open.

task_completion.description: Link the asset 'Patient Records Database' to the risk.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, selection list, or linking field for Business Assets shows 'Patient Records Database' selected or added to the risk.

task_completion.description: Update the risk description to include the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Primary impact target is the Patient Records Database containing ePHI' is visible inside the description text area of the risk.

task_completion.description: Save the changes so the risk successfully reflects both the linked asset and the updated description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification after saving, or the view/details screen of the risk 'Unencrypted Data at Rest' displaying both the linked 'Patient Records Database' asset and the newly added description text.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eramba web GUI to complete the task, not direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed in a web browser showing the Eramba interface. There should be no terminal windows open executing MySQL INSERT/UPDATE commands.

integrity.description: The description text was entered into the actual Eramba application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required text is typed or pasted directly into the Eramba web form's description field, not just written in an external text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements/DOM inspector) are open and being used to alter the text on the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Risk Title: 'Unencrypted Data at Rest'. Target Asset Name: 'Patient Records Database'. Required Description Text: 'Primary impact target is the Patient Records Database containing ePHI'. The task must be completed within the Eramba GRC web interface. The agent is expected to link the asset to the risk and update the risk description field with the exact required text.
